mapper.select: SELECT id, seat_id, repeat_type, start_date_time, end_date_time, day_of_week, day_of_month, reason, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM seat_unavailable WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT id, seat_id, repeat_type, start_date_time, end_date_time, day_of_week, day_of_month, reason, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM seat_unavailable WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND ( (repeat_type = 'ONCE' AND start_date_time <= #{now} AND end_date_time >= #{now}) OR (repeat_type = 'DAILY' AND DATE(start_date_time) <= DATE(#{now}) AND DATE(end_date_time) >= DATE(#{now})) OR (repeat_type = 'WEEKLY' AND day_of_week = DAYOFWEEK(#{now}) AND DATE(start_date_time) <= DATE(#{now}) AND DATE(end_date_time) >= DATE(#{now})) OR (repeat_type = 'MONTHLY' AND day_of_month = DAY(#{now}) AND DATE(start_date_time) <= DATE(#{now}) AND DATE(end_date_time) >= DATE(#{now})) ) AND TIME(start_date_time) <= TIME(#{now}) AND TIME(end_date_time) >= TIME(#{now})
